answers: Major space agencies: NASA (US), ESA (Europe), ISRO (India), JAXA (Japan), SpaceX (private), and CNSA (China).
Current missions: Mars rovers, James Webb Space Telescope, Artemis Moon program, ISS operations, and Starship development.
Future: return to Moon (Artemis), Mars missions (2030s), asteroid mining, space tourism, and permanent Moon base.
Space exploration matters: inspires innovation, develops technology, and answers fundamental questions about our place in the universe.
